zephyrSteps.description: Verify panel is in DISARMED state before test begins
zephyrSteps.expectedResult: Panel shows DISARMED status. No active alarms.
zephyrSteps.manualStep: Verify panel is in DISARMED state

zephyrSteps.description: User enters ARM STAY code at keypad
zephyrSteps.expectedResult: Keypad accepts code. ARM STAY sequence initiated.
zephyrSteps.manualStep: Enter master code and press ARM STAY
zephyrSteps.automationStep: Enter master code and press ARM STAY button

zephyrSteps.description: Panel transitions to ARMED STAY immediately (no exit delay)
zephyrSteps.expectedResult: Panel immediately shows ARMED STAY. No exit delay countdown.
zephyrSteps.manualStep: Observe panel state after ARM STAY command
zephyrSteps.automationStep: Assert panel state equals ARMED_STAY without waiting for countdown

zephyrSteps.description: Interior motion sensors are bypassed in ARM STAY mode
zephyrSteps.expectedResult: Interior motion sensors show BYPASSED. Perimeter sensors remain active.
zephyrSteps.automationStep: Assert INTERIOR_MOTION sensor type is bypassed

zephyrSteps.description: Cancel ARM STAY before entry delay expires
zephyrSteps.expectedResult: Panel returns to DISARMED. No alarm sounded.
zephyrSteps.manualStep: Trigger a door sensor, then enter disarm code before countdown expires
zephyrSteps.automationStep: Trigger entry sensor, assert countdown active, then disarm before expiry
zephyrSteps.manualResult: Panel returns to DISARMED without sounding alarm

zephyrSteps.description: ARM STAY with exit delay panel setting enabled
zephyrSteps.expectedResult: When exit delay is configured, ARM STAY shows a brief countdown before arming.
zephyrSteps.manualStep: Enable exit delay in panel settings, then ARM STAY
zephyrSteps.automationStep: Configure exit delay setting, arm stay, assert delay countdown visible before ARMED_STAY
requirements: Exit delay respected in stay mode when configured

matches.issue: Java block 5 triggers the entry sensor and asserts the countdown is active, but never calls disarmBeforeEntryDelay(). The critical assertion â€” that disarming mid-countdown suppresses the alarm â€” is absent.
No REPORT() block exercises ARM STAY with exit delay panel setting enabled. Test always uses default panel config.

analysis.reasoning: The automation covers the entry-delay trigger correctly but stops short of the disarm-before-expiry assertion. The missing call is panel.disarmBeforeEntryDelay(code) followed by assertState(DISARMED). Without it, a regression where mid-countdown disarm fails to suppress the alarm would pass the test entirely.
analysis.recommendation: Add disarmBeforeEntryDelay() call and assertState(DISARMED) assertion after assertEntryDelayActive().
